2604.23356.title: VeriLLMed: Interactive Visual Debugging of Medical Large Language Models with Knowledge Graphs
2604.23356.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) show promise in medical diagnosis, but real-world deployment remains challenging due to high-stakes clinical decisions and imperfect reasoning reliability. As a result, careful inspection of model behavior is essential for assessing whether diagnostic reasoning is reliable and clinically grounded. However, debugging medical LLMs remains difficult. First, developers often lack sufficient medical domain expertise to interpret model errors in clinically meaningful terms. Second, models can fail across a large and diverse set of instances involving different input types, tasks, and reasoning steps, making it challenging for developers to prioritize which errors deserve focused inspection. Third, developers struggle to identify recurring error patterns across cases, as existing debugging practices are largely instance-centric and rely on manual inspection of isolated failures. To address these challenges, we present VeriLLMed, a visual analytics system that integrates external biomedical knowledge to audit and debug medical LLM diagnostic reasoning. VeriLLMed transforms model outputs into comparable reasoning paths, constructs knowledge graph-grounded reference paths, and identifies three recurring classes of diagnosis errors: relation errors, branch errors, and missing errors. Case studies and expert evaluation demonstrate that VeriLLMed helps developers identify clinically implausible reasoning and generate actionable insights that can inform the improvement of medical LLMs.
2604.23356.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在醫療診斷中顯示出潛力，但由於高風險的臨床決策和不完善的推理可靠性，實際應用仍然具有挑戰性。<lb/>因此，仔細檢查模型行為對於評估診斷推理是否可靠且臨床基礎至關重要。<lb/>然而，調試醫療LLMs仍然困難重重。<lb/>首先，開發者通常缺乏足夠的醫學領域專業知識，無法以臨床意義解釋模型錯誤。<lb/>其次，模型可能在涉及不同輸入類型、任務和推理步驟的大量多樣實例中失敗，這使得開發者難以優先考慮哪些錯誤值得重點檢查。<lb/>第三，開發者難以識別跨案例的重複錯誤模式，因為現有的調試實踐主要以實例為中心，並依賴於對孤立失敗的手動檢查。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了VeriLLMed，一個視覺分析系統，該系統整合了外部生物醫學知識，以審核和調試醫療LLM的診斷推理。<lb/>VeriLLMed將模型輸出轉換為可比較的推理路徑，構建基於知識圖譜的參考路徑，並識別三類重複的診斷錯誤：關係錯誤、分支錯誤和缺失錯誤。<lb/>案例研究和專家評估表明，VeriLLMed幫助開發者識別臨床上不合理的推理，並生成可行的見解，這些見解可以促進醫療LLMs的改進。
2604.23356.author: Yurui Xiang et.al.
2604.23356.authors: Yurui Xiang, Xingyi Mao, Rui Sheng, Zixin Chen, Zelin Zang, Yuyang Wu, Haipeng Zeng, Huamin Qu, Yushi Sun, Yanna Lin
